description: Style Noteboss Orange embodies men's free, optimistic and joyful spirit. It was launched by the house of Boss in 2011 with Orlando Bloom as the face of the fragrance.  Product DetailsThe accords are spicy with top notes of fresh apple, vanilla, warm incense and exotic African Bubinga wood.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize60 ml
